metadata.description: XenForo 2.3+ add-on development knowledge base, packaged as a Claude Code plugin.

plugins.name: xenforo-addon-dev
plugins.description: Comprehensive XenForo 2.3+ add-on development reference: entities, finders, repositories, controllers, routing, templates, services, jobs, cron, handlers, content types, permissions, options, phrases, criteria, schema migrations, events/listeners/class-extensions, widgets, styles/Less, style properties, template modifications, navigation, build/release tooling, the REST API, and a copy-paste cookbook.
